public_reputation: Known around Soreheim Proper through day-to-day work as scribe.
appearance: Veyra Hearthwrit usually presents in layered civic fabric cut to show rank without inviting touch, with details that make their scribe status legible before introductions begin.
manner: Listens for contradictions, omissions, and names that do not quite align, then files them where they can matter later. In Soreheim Proper, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of scribe in and around Soreheim Proper, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Soreheim Proper workable through the obligations of scribe while managing the immediate pressure of quota demands, political rivalry, foreign pressure.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of scribe credible while absorbing the strain created by quota demands, political rivalry, foreign pressure.

adventure_hooks.summary: Veyra Hearthwrit can draw the party into a locality problem centered on scribe duties in Soreheim Proper.
Veyra Hearthwrit becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with quota demands, political rivalry, foreign pressure around Soreheim Proper.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe. V33_1 additive depth pass preserved canon while strengthening at-table identity, appearance, and social motive.
public_signal: In public, Veyra Hearthwrit is immediately readable as a scribe tied to Soreheim Proper.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Soreheim Proper: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Veyra Hearthwrit presents as someone shaped by the duties of a scribe and the daily pressures of Soreheim Proper.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a scribe, and proof that strangers will not make Soreheim Proper harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Veyra Hearthwrit refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a scribe too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can notice inconsistencies, formalize statements, and preserve proof that others hoped would blur.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Veyra Hearthwrit adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Veyra Hearthwrit always knows more about Soreheim Proper than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a scribe in Soreheim Proper.
